title: eKey 2.0 Digital Identity Service Framework
summary: Provides secure single sign-on for public and private eServices using AI-enabled eKYC, biometric verification, encrypted device-based data and user-controlled authentication for digital service access.

theme_notes.digital_government.digital_identity_trus: National digital identity and single sign-on service framework.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Digital Government Strategy 2022 and Electronic Communications and Transactions Law
